Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements

Class DefaultRequirements

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.DefaultRequirements
public final class DefaultRequirements
extends Object
Verifies API requirements using the default configuration.

The assertion status of the Configuration class determines whether assertThat() carries out a verification or does nothing.

See Also:
Requirements, JavaRequirements, GuavaRequirements

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static boolean assertionsAreEnabled()
    Returns true if assertions are enabled for this class.
    static ArrayVerifier<boolean[],​Boolean> assertThat​(boolean[] actual, String name)
    Same as requireThat(boolean[], String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.

    Same as requireThat(boolean, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled for this class.

  • Method Details

    • assertionsAreEnabled

      public static boolean assertionsAreEnabled()
      Returns true if assertions are enabled for this class.
      Returns:
      true if assertions are enabled for this class

    • requireThat

      public static <T> ObjectVerifier<T> requireThat​(T actual, String name)
      Verifies the requirements of an Object.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • assertThat

      public static <T> ObjectVerifier<T> assertThat​(T actual, String name)
      Same as requireThat(Object, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • validateThat

      public static <T> ObjectValidator<T> validateThat​(T actual, String name)
      Validates the requirements of an Object.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a validator for the value
      Throws:

      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • validateThat

      Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean array.
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a validator for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

      Returns:
      a validator for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • requireThat

      public static <T> ClassVerifier<T> requireThat​(Class<T> actual, String name)
      Verifies the requirements of a Class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of class
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • assertThat

      public static <T> ClassVerifier<T> assertThat​(Class<T> actual, String name)
      Same as requireThat(Class, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of class
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty
